prompt: Find where the Engine struct is defined and show me its fields and methods.
result_text:
Here's a comprehensive overview of the `Engine` struct:

---

## `Engine` Struct

**File:** `crates/core/src/engine/mod.rs`

### Fields

```rust
pub struct Engine {
    pub(super) config: IndexConfig,
    pub(super) store: IndexStore,
    pub(super) parser: Parser,
    pub(super) tantivy: TantivyIndex,
    pub(super) symbols: SymbolTable,
    pub(super) file_chunk_counts: HashMap<String, usize>,        // Per-file chunk counts for stats
    pub(super) embedder: Option<Arc<Embedder>>,                  // Optional fastembed vector embedding model
    pub(super) vector: Option<VectorIndex>,                      // Optional usearch HNSW vector index
    pub(super) chunk_meta: DashMap<u64, ChunkMeta>,              // Chunk metadata for vector results
    pub(super) graph: Option<CodeGraph>,                         // Optional dependency graph + PageRank
    pub(super) reranker: Option<Arc<Reranker>>,                  // Optional cross-encoder reranker (BGE)
    pub(super) trigram: OnceLock<TrigramIndex>,                  // Lazy-loaded trigram index (exact search)
    session: Arc<SessionState>,                                  // Session state for agent interactions
    shared_session: SharedSession,                               // Shared session for multi-agent context
    read_only: bool,                                             // True if opened without write lock
    pub(super) file_trigram: OnceLock<FileTrigramIndex>,         // Lazy-loaded file-level trigram index
    recency_map: OnceLock<HashMap<String, i64>>,                 // Git recency map (file → last commit time)
    last_load_time: Option<SystemTime>,                          // When engine was last loaded from disk
    reload_interval: Duration,                                   // Min interval between reload checks (30s default)
    last_staleness_check: Option<Instant>,                       // Last staleness check time
}
```

---

### Methods (by module)

The methods are spread across **10 implementation files**:

#### `engine/init.rs` — Lifecycle
| Method | Description |
|--------|-------------|
| `init(root, config) -> Result<Self>` | Initialize a new index |
| `open(root) -> Result<Self>` | Open an existing index (with read-only fallback) |
| `open_read_only(root) -> Result<Self>` | Open in explicit read-only mode |
| `is_read_only(&self) -> bool` | Check if engine is read-only |

#### `engine/mod.rs` — Core Accessors
| Method | Description |
|--------|-------------|
| `stats(&self) -> IndexStats` | Summary statistics |
| `config(&self) -> &IndexConfig` | Access config |
| `symbol_table(&self) -> &SymbolTable` | Access symbol table |
| `index_exists(root) -> bool` | Check if index directory exists |
| `session(&self) -> &Arc<SessionState>` | Access session state |
| `set_session(&mut self, session)` | Replace session state |
| `shared_session(&self) -> &SharedSession` | Access shared session |
| `set_shared_session(&mut self, shared)` | Replace shared session |
| `get_chunk_content(&self, chunk_id) -> Option<String>` | Retrieve chunk from Tantivy |
| `resolve_chunk_content(&self, chunk_id) -> Option<String>` | Get chunk with fallback |
| `file_neighbors(&self, file) -> Vec<String>` | Combined callers + callees |

#### `engine/search.rs` — Search
| Method | Description |
|--------|-------------|
| `search(&self, query) -> Result<Vec<SearchResult>>` | Main search with strategy support |
| `search_multi(&self, queries, base_query) -> Result<Vec<SearchResult>>` | Multi-query RRF fusion |
| `search_with_progress(&mut self, on_progress) -> Result<Vec<SearchResult>>` | Search with progress callback |
| `detect_strategy(&self, query) -> Strategy` | Auto-detect optimal search strategy |
| `format_results(&self, results, token_budget) -> String` | Format results as string |
| `search_usages(&self, symbol, limit) -> Result<Vec<SearchResult>>` | Find symbol usages |

#### `engine/files.rs` — File I/O
| Method | Description |
|--------|-------------|
| `read_file_range(&self, path, line_start, line_end) -> Result<Option<String>>` | Read file line range |
| `read_symbol_source(&self, name, file) -> Result<Option<String>>` | Read symbol source code |
| `grep_code(&self, pattern, literal, glob, ctx_lines, limit) -> Result<Vec<GrepMatch>>` | Regex/literal grep |
| `grep_code_full_scan(...)` | Full file content grep |

#### `engine/sync.rs` — Indexing & Sync
| Method | Description |
|--------|-------------|
| `reindex_file(&mut self, path) -> Result<()>` | Re-index a single file |
| `remove_file(&mut self, path) -> Result<()>` | Remove a file from index |
| `watch(&self) -> Result<FileWatcher>` | Create a file watcher |
| `apply_changes(&mut self, changes) -> Result<()>` | Apply batch file changes |
| `embed_remaining(&mut self) -> Result<usize>` | Embed remaining chunks |
| `sync(&mut self) -> Result<SyncStats>` | Sync with filesystem |
| `sync_with_progress(&mut self, on_progress) -> Result<SyncStats>` | Sync with progress callback |
| `git_sync(&mut self) -> Result<GitSyncStats>` | Sync using git diff |
| `save(&self) -> Result<()>` | Persist index to disk |
| `persist_incremental(&self) -> Result<()>` | Incremental persist |

#### `engine/graph.rs` — Dependency Graph
| Method | Description |
|--------|-------------|
| `repo_map(&self, options) -> Option<String>` | Token-budgeted repo map |
| `callers(&self, file) -> Vec<String>` | Direct importers of a file |
| `callees(&self, file) -> Vec<String>` | Files a file imports |
| `transitive_callers(&self, file, depth) -> Vec<String>` | Transitive callers |
| `transitive_callees(&self, file, depth) -> Vec<String>` | Transitive callees |
| `dependencies(&self, file, depth) -> Vec<String>` | Transitive deps |
| `graph_stats(&self) -> Option<GraphStats>` | Graph statistics |
| `graph_data(&self) -> Option<GraphData>` | Flat graph snapshot |
| `call_graph_edges(&self) -> Vec<(String, String, String)>` | All symbol-level call edges |
| `has_call_graph(&self) -> bool` | Check if call graph exists |
| `has_symbol_graph(&self) -> bool` | Check if symbol graph is built |
| `symbol_callers_from_graph(&self, symbol) -> Vec<(String, String)>` | Symbol-level callers |
| `symbol_callees_from_graph(&self, symbol) -> Vec<String>` | Symbol-level callees |
| `personalized_pagerank(&self, seeds) -> HashMap<String, f32>` | Personalized PageRank |
| `symbols(&self, filter, file) -> Result<Vec<Symbol>>` | Query symbol table |

#### Other Modules
- **`engine/focus_map.rs`**: `focus_map()`, `focus_map_from_git()`
- **`engine/symbol_graph.rs`**: `symbol_callers_precise()`, `symbol_callees_precise()`
- **`engine/reload.rs`**: `set_reload_interval()`, `reload_if_stale()`
- **`engine/validation.rs`**: `check_staleness()`, `validate_rename()`
- **`engine/temporal.rs`**: `root()`, `get_hotspots()`, `search_changes()`, `get_blame()`, `file_change_frequency()`
- **`engine/test_mapping.rs`**: `build_test_map()`, `find_tests_for_file()`, `find_source_for_test()`, `is_test_file()`
- **`engine/orphans.rs`**: `find_orphans()`

---

**In total**: 20 struct fields and ~68 public methods across 10 implementation files. The struct is a rich search/indexing engine combining full-text search (Tantivy), vector search (usearch HNSW), symbol analysis, dependency graphs, git integration, and session state.

prompt: Find where the Engine struct is defined and show me its fields and methods.
result_text:
Here is a complete breakdown of the `Engine` struct — its definition, fields, and all methods organized by sub-module.

---

## Struct Definition

**File:** `crates/core/src/engine/mod.rs` (lines 232–273)

```rust
pub struct Engine {
    // --- Core indexing ---
    pub(super) config: IndexConfig,           // Index configuration
    pub(super) store: IndexStore,             // Persistence layer (file system)
    pub(super) parser: Parser,               // Source code parser
    pub(super) tantivy: TantivyIndex,        // Full-text search index (BM25)
    pub(super) symbols: SymbolTable,         // Symbol definitions table
    pub(super) file_chunk_counts: HashMap<String, usize>, // Per-file chunk counts (for stats)

    // --- Vector / semantic search ---
    pub(super) embedder: Option<Arc<Embedder>>,  // Optional fastembed model
    pub(super) vector: Option<VectorIndex>,       // Optional usearch HNSW index
    pub(super) chunk_meta: DashMap<u64, ChunkMeta>, // Hydration table for vector results

    // --- Graph intelligence ---
    pub(super) graph: Option<CodeGraph>,     // Dependency graph with PageRank scores
    pub(super) reranker: Option<Arc<Reranker>>, // Cross-encoder reranker (BGE-Reranker-Base, `deep` strategy)

    // --- Trigram indexes (lazy) ---
    pub(super) trigram: OnceLock<TrigramIndex>,          // Chunk-level trigram index (Strategy::Exact)
    pub(super) file_trigram: OnceLock<FileTrigramIndex>, // File-level trigram (grep pre-filtering)

    // --- Session state ---
    session: Arc<SessionState>,          // Per-agent session tracking
    shared_session: SharedSession,       // Multi-agent shared context store

    // --- Read-only / reload support ---
    read_only: bool,                     // True if opened without Tantivy write lock
    recency_map: OnceLock<HashMap<String, i64>>, // Git recency map (lazy)
    last_load_time: Option<SystemTime>,  // When last loaded from disk
    reload_interval: Duration,           // Min interval between reload checks (default: 30s)
    last_staleness_check: Option<Instant>,
}
```

---

## Methods by Sub-Module

### `mod.rs` — Core / Lifecycle
| Method | Description |
|---|---|
| `init(config)` | Initialize a new index from scratch |
| `open(root)` | Open an existing index (write mode) |
| `open_read_only(root)` | Open without acquiring the write lock |
| `is_read_only()` | Returns `true` if opened read-only |
| `set_reload_interval(dur)` | Configure staleness check interval |
| `reload_if_stale()` | Check and hot-reload the index if stale |
| `reload_from_disk()` | Force reload all index data from disk |
| `stats()` | Return `IndexStats` (file/chunk/symbol/vector counts) |
| `config()` | Access `IndexConfig` |
| `symbol_table()` | Access `SymbolTable` |
| `index_exists(root)` | Static: check if `.codixing/` exists at path |
| `session()` | Access session state |
| `set_session(s)` | Replace session state |
| `shared_session()` | Access shared multi-agent session store |
| `set_shared_session(s)` | Replace shared session store |
| `get_chunk_content(id)` | Fetch chunk content from Tantivy |
| `resolve_chunk_content(id)` | Fetch content (in-memory cache → Tantivy fallback) |
| `file_neighbors(file)` | Get callers + callees for a file (for session boost) |
| `get_recency_map()` | Lazily build git recency map (180-day window) |
| `get_trigram()` | Lazily load/rebuild chunk-level trigram index |
| `get_file_trigram()` | Lazily load/rebuild file-level trigram index |
| `check_staleness()` | Report which files are modified/new/deleted |
| `validate_rename(old, new)` | Validate a symbol rename for conflicts |

---

### `search.rs` — Search & Retrieval
| Method | Description |
|---|---|
| `search(query)` | Primary search dispatch (auto-detects strategy) |
| `search_multi(queries)` | Multi-query RRF-fused search |
| `search_exact(query)` | Sub-millisecond trigram exact search |
| `search_with_progress(query, cb)` | Search with streaming progress callback |
| `search_explore(query)` | BM25 + graph expansion search |
| `search_deep(query)` | Hybrid search + cross-encoder reranking |
| `search_usages(symbol)` | Find usages of a symbol by name |
| `search_first_pass(query)` | Internal: first-pass BM25 retrieval |
| `detect_strategy(query)` | Auto-detect best strategy for a query |
| `format_results(results)` | Format results for output |
| `pipeline_for_strategy(strategy)` | Build a `SearchPipeline` for the given strategy |
| `search_context(query)` | Build a `SearchContext` for a query |
| `apply_graph_boost(results)` | Boost results connected to session-hot files |
| `apply_definition_boost(results)` | Boost definition chunks over usage chunks |
| `apply_test_demotion(results)` | Demote test/infra file results |
| `apply_popularity_boost(results)` | Boost files with high PageRank |

---

### `sync.rs` — Indexing & Persistence
| Method | Description |
|---|---|
| `reindex_file(path)` | Re-index a single file |
| `reindex_file_impl(path)` | Internal: full re-index implementation |
| `remove_file(path)` | Remove a file from the index |
| `remove_file_inner(path)` | Internal: removal implementation |
| `watch()` | Start a file watcher |
| `apply_changes(changes)` | Apply a batch of file-system changes |
| `embed_remaining()` | Embed any pending un-vectorized chunks |
| `sync()` | Full sync of working tree changes |
| `sync_with_progress(cb)` | Sync with streaming progress callback |
| `git_sync()` | Sync only files changed since last git commit |
| `save()` | Persist the full index to disk |
| `persist_incremental()` | Persist only changed portions incrementally |

---

### `files.rs` — File Reading & Grep
| Method | Description |
|---|---|
| `read_file_range(path, start, end)` | Read a line range from a file |
| `read_symbol_source(symbol)` | Read the source of a symbol by name |
| `grep_code(pattern, options)` | Regex grep with trigram pre-filtering |
| `grep_code_full_scan(pattern, options)` | Full-scan grep (fallback, no trigram) |

---

### `graph.rs` — Dependency Graph
| Method | Description |
|---|---|
| `repo_map(options)` | Generate a token-budgeted repository map |
| `callers(file)` | Direct callers/importers of a file |
| `callees(file)` | Direct callees/dependencies of a file |
| `transitive_callers(file)` | All transitive callers up to depth |
| `transitive_callees(file)` | All transitive callees up to depth |
| `dependencies(file)` | File-level dependency list |
| `graph_stats()` | Return `GraphStats` |
| `graph_data()` | Return raw `GraphData` |
| `call_graph_edges()` | Return all call-graph edges |
| `has_call_graph()` | Whether a call graph is available |
| `has_symbol_graph()` | Whether a symbol graph is available |
| `symbol_callers_from_graph(sym)` | Graph-based symbol caller lookup |
| `symbol_callees_from_graph(sym)` | Graph-based symbol callee lookup |
| `personalized_pagerank(seeds)` | Run personalized PageRank from seed files |
| `symbols()` | Return all indexed symbols |

---

### `symbol_graph.rs` — Precise Symbol References
| Method | Description |
|---|---|
| `symbol_callers_precise(sym)` | Parse-based precise caller discovery |
| `symbol_callees_precise(sym)` | Parse-based precise callee discovery |
| `read_line_at_symbol(sym)` | Read the source line at a symbol's location |
| `symbol_line(sym)` | Return the line number of a symbol |

---

### `focus_map.rs` — Focus Map (Contextual File Ranking)
| Method | Description |
|---|---|
| `focus_map(seeds, options)` | Build a PageRank-seeded focus map |
| `focus_map_from_git(options)` | Build focus map seeded from git working tree changes |

---

### `temporal.rs` — Git History
| Method | Description |
|---|---|
| `root()` | Return the project root path |
| `get_hotspots(days, limit)` | Find most frequently changed files |
| `search_changes(query, file)` | Search commit messages |
| `get_blame(file, range)` | Git blame for a file/range |
| `file_change_frequency(file)` | Change count for a specific file |

---

### `test_mapping.rs` — Test Discovery
| Method | Description |
|---|---|
| `build_test_map(options)` | Discover all test-to-source mappings |
| `find_tests_for_file(source)` | Find test files for a given source file |
| `find_source_for_test(test)` | Find source files for a given test file |
| `is_test_file(path)` | Check if a file is a test file |

---

### `orphans.rs` — Dead Code Detection
| Method | Description |
|---|---|
| `find_orphans(options)` | Find files with no importers (orphan/dead-code candidates) |

---

### Summary

The `Engine` is the central orchestrator of the Codixing indexing system. Its fields cover **5 major subsystems**:
1. **BM25 full-text search** (Tantivy)
2. **Vector/semantic search** (fastembed + usearch HNSW)
3. **Code graph intelligence** (PageRank, call graph, import graph)
4. **Exact/grep search** (trigram indexes, lazy-loaded)
5. **Session & multi-agent state** (per-session + shared)

Methods are spread across **9 sub-modules** totaling ~40+ public/internal methods.
